title: Pruhliere Proverbs — Andrew Pruhliere aphorism cluster, Apr 2025
html:
TL;DR

  • A short collection of proverbs / one-liners Yahir attributes to Andrew Pruhliere (the friend later confirmed in 2025 07 18 slideshow death song as "Andrew Pruhliere — play that funky music white boy").
  • Selected lines:
    • "An itchy ass is the sign of a dirty ass."
    • "No means literally nothing."
    • "A nice ass is the sign of a consistent life."
    • "You don't have to watch your calories to eat a good pussy."
    • "Your penis is connected to your subconscious."
    • "A dominant woman is a resemblance of a strong woman."
    • "Restrain the enemy's weapon and you ensure the fight."
    • "Nothing gets resolved with violence — think of the treaty of Versailles."
    • "Sharing means nothing — a society of lies."
  • Closes with the cryptic "The lion."

Pattern observed

Crude-comedic surface, anti-establishment moral underneath. Mix of locker-room humor and political-history references (Versailles).

Why it matters in the graph

  • Confirms Andrew Pruhliere as a recurring character — he's the friend from the 2025 05 09 initiation to chelympics tournament too (the bonus surfaced in that summary).
  • "Nothing gets resolved with violence — Treaty of Versailles" is a direct counter to the violence as only effective tool line Yahir captured 3 years earlier in 2022 03 11 one hundred years of solitude reading log — the friend group has internal disagreement on this question, which is itself a graph-worthy tension.
  • "Restrain the enemy's weapon and you ensure the fight" — Pruhliere doctrine that pairs with Yahir's asking the right question strategic-frame.

Open questions

  • Are these things Pruhliere actually says, or Yahir's summaries of his vibe?
  • Does Pruhliere have his own version of the never forget creed — the two notes feel structurally parallel.

Wikilinks
